title: Elf Jumbo Snap Cards – 52 Piece Matching Card Game for Kids – Fun Christmas Elf Activity, Party Game & Stocking Filler
features: ELF SNAP CARDS – Jumbo snap card game containing 52 cards featuring festive designs including candy canes, snowmen and elves
JUMBO CARD SIZE – Each card measures 12.3 cm x 8 cm, making them easy for children to hold and shuffle
FUN FAMILY GAME – Great for parties, family gatherings and keeping kids entertained during the Christmas countdown
EASY TO CLEAN – Gloss front and matte back allows the cards to be wiped clean for repeated use
PERFECT STOCKING FILLER – Lightweight and compact game that can be used year after year for festive fun
description: Make playtime more festive with the Gem Imports Elf Jumbo Snap Cards – the perfect Christmas activity for children and families. This fun matching game includes 52 jumbo-sized cards, each decorated with colourful festive designs such as candy canes, snowmen, Christmas trees, gingerbread men and elves. The cards are designed with a gloss finish on the front and a matte finish on the back, making them easy to shuffle, handle and wipe clean after play. Each card measures approximately 12.3 cm x 8 cm, making them large enough for little hands to hold comfortably and ideal for family games around the table. Perfect for encouraging memory skills, hand-eye coordination and quick thinking, Elf Snap is a fantastic way to keep kids entertained during the countdown to Christmas. Use them as a stocking filler, party game, or a fun activity on Christmas Eve to get everyone involved in the festive spirit. Lightweight and easy to store, they can be brought out year after year for holiday fun.
